cards.example: The city has one thousand houses.
They live in a big house.
The book is on the table.
The cat sleeps on the bed.
There is a picture on the wall.
The toy is on the floor.
He drinks tea from a cup.
The clock is on the wall.
A bird sat in the tree.
I live in a big city.
The keys are in my bag.
The book is on the table.
She wants to become a doctor.
Put the book on the table.
We need to change our plans.
Babies sleep most of the day.
Add some salt to the soup.
We ate watermelon at the picnic.
He fried a mushroom in butter.
We had roasted chicken for dinner.
They shared a bottle of wine.
Put the food on a plate.
She filled the bowl with soup.
He poured tea into a cup.
Cut the bread with a knife.
Stir the soup with a spoon.
Wipe your mouth with a napkin.
She opened a bottle of juice.
Fry the egg in a pan.
Cook the soup in a pot.
Be careful, the soup is hot.
I like cold lemonade very much.
We wore sandals at the beach.
The zipper on his jacket broke.
He put keys in his pocket.
The shirt has a stiff collar.
The heel of her shoe broke.
The sole of his boot wore out.
This sweater is made of wool.
Her blouse is made of silk.
Her coat has a fur collar.
These socks are made of nylon.
I need it to fit properly.
